title: UK financial regulator floats allowing 10% crypto allocations for retail funds
summary: The Financial Conduct Authority floated the idea of allowing limited exposure to crypto for retail-focused funds if it aligns with “disclosed investment objectives.”

title: Humanity Protocol token falls 85% amid $30M private key exploit
summary: The compromise of private keys belonging to a member of the Humanity Foundation has reportedly resulted in the theft of at least $30 million worth of its native token.

title: Stocks Extend Rebound After AI Selloff, Oil Drops: Markets Wrap
summary: A rebound in equities that began on Wall Street extended into Asia, as cheaper valuations for artificial intelligence shares lured investors. Crude oil declined as tensions in the Middle East eased.

title: Indonesia’s Bond Selloff Extends as Five-Year Note Yield Surges
summary: Indonesia’s bond market selloff deepened as the nation’s five-year note yield climbed to the highest level in more than six years.

title: Coinbase Executive: Massive Institutions Are Buying Bitcoin’s Crash

title: OpenAI Wants to Kill the Chatbot It Invented and Turn It Into a Superapp
summary: The company that launched ChatGPT in 2022 is now betting its future on something closer to WeChat than a Q&A box

title: OpenAI Confirms Confidential IPO Filing, Keeps Timing Open
summary: The ChatGPT maker says it has filed paperwork for a potential public offering but may remain private while it pursues other priorities.

title: Wallets linked to Humanity Protocol drained for over $32 million, token plunges 89%: onchain analyst
summary: Out of the stolen amount, $23.7 million has been swapped for Ethereum, while around $7.9 million remains in H tokens.

title: Brazen bitcoin kidnapping and carjacking co-conspirator pleads guilty, faces up to 20 years in prison: DOJ
summary: Six men from Florida carjacked Sushil and Radhika Chetal's Lamborghini Urus, beat the couple and briefly detained them.

title: SpaceX’s $1.78tn IPO asks investors to buy Musk’s moonshots
summary: Public markets asked to price in advances in AI, Starlink and space-based computing long before lift-off

title: OpenAI files to go public in blockbuster Wall Street listing
summary: ChatGPT creator has submitted paperwork for IPO expected to value company at more than $1tn
